title: Brain-wide correspondence of neuronal epigenomics and distant projections.

content: S-EPMC10719087 PMC10719087 Brain-wide correspondence of neuronal epigenomics and distant projections. Single-cell analyses parse the brain's billions of neurons into thousands of 'cell-type' clusters residing in different brain structures<sup>1</sup>. Many cell types mediate their functions through
